title: Inventory SAM prevalence and treatment data sources
outcome: Dated source inventory separating survey, program, and unusable data.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Estimate district-level SAM burden from survey data
outcome: District-level SAM prevalence and burden estimates with confidence intervals and survey-year documentation.
validation_method: Replicator reruns on alternative survey subsets and confirms estimates within reported confidence intervals.
done_condition: Estimates include CI, survey year, sample size, and replication.

title: Analyze SAM treatment coverage gaps at district level
outcome: District-level comparison of estimated SAM cases to children treated, with coverage gap classification.
validation_method: Replicator reruns with alternative treatment data sources and confirms gap classification robustness.
done_condition: Coverage gap analysis includes data reconciliation methodology, explicit caveats about HMIS completeness, and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of treatment coverage gap data
outcome: Failure-mode review for supply-chain misallocation and program-defunding risks.

title: Check whether outputs match nutrition program decision needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated review.
